response.original_title: Une délégation de très haut niveau
response.overview: Is North Korea really the last paradise on Earth? Aware of the Western media’s imperfections, bias, and even dishonesty, *Strip-Tease* set out to get to the bottom of it. As the first Western television crew to be allowed to film in the country in about a decade, the Strip-Tease team did not travel alone, but was accompanied by a “high-level delegation.”
response.title: Une délégation de très haut niveau
